verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where would I be You only know I'm Glad You see through eyes of love A hopeless case, an empty place If not for Grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I thank you for the things I can not see You've been a shelter in the stars of life A shield surrounding me And I thank you for the mercy you've provided And though you could have walked away But you stayed a thousand times

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Amazing grace how sweet the sound I once was lost but now I'm found A hopeless case, an empty place If not for Grace
